We are looking for an experienced LLM Application Engineer to design, build, and operate production-grade AI applications based on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Agentic architectures.

In this role, you will work on real-world enterprise use cases, integrating LLMs with internal systems, APIs, workflows, and automation platforms. You will be responsible not only for model interaction, but also for system reliability, governance, scalability, and security.

This is a hands-on engineering role with strong ownership over architecture and delivery.

Responsibilities:
1.  LLM & Agent Application Development
 •  Design and implement RAG pipelines, including document ingestion, embedding strategies, vector storage, retrieval optimization, and prompt orchestration.
 •  Build agent-based systems capable of tool calling, multi-step reasoning, and workflow orchestration.
 •  Develop conversational and task-oriented AI agents that interact with enterprise systems, databases, and APIs.

2.  System Integration & Automation
 •  Integrate LLM applications with existing enterprise platforms (ERP, CRM, BI, internal services).
 •  Implement agentic workflows combined with automation tools (e.g., RPA, workflow engines, or low-code platforms).
 •  Design API-based integrations for third-party services and internal microservices.

3.  Architecture & Production Readiness
 •  Design scalable, maintainable architectures for LLM applications running in production.
 •  Implement logging, monitoring, evaluation, and error-handling for AI agents.
 •  Ensure solutions meet security, governance, and compliance requirements (e.g., access control, data isolation, auditability).

4.  DevOps & Delivery
 •  Containerize and deploy LLM services using Docker and CI/CD pipelines.
 •  Collaborate with product, operations, and business stakeholders to translate requirements into reliable AI systems.
 •  Take technical ownership from prototype to production rollout.

技術支援工程師
【應屆畢業生✔ 無經驗✔ 提供培訓✔】
我們正在尋找對 系統維運、網路與 IT 技術有興趣 的你，
不論你是應屆畢業生，或剛踏入職場的新鮮人，只要對Linux作業環境下操作技術有高度興趣都非常歡迎加入！

對於輪班有問題的夥伴，可以參考我們linkedin上的Q&A解答您的疑惑喔！
https://reurl.cc/WbrWeL

【工作內容】
你將與團隊一起，確保系統穩定運作並持續優化：
• 伺服器監控與維運（Linux / Windows） 
• 網站與網路服務狀態監測，確保服務穩定 
• 協助系統部署、建置與版本升級 
• 參與運維架構優化，提升整體效能與穩定性 
• 協助處理技術問題，提供即時支援與問題排除 
• 撰寫與維護 SOP，累積團隊維運知識、標準化作業
這個工作不只是操作，而是如何讓系統長期穩定運行。

【我們希望你具備】
• 對 IT、系統、網路或維運領域有興趣 
• 願意學習新技術，對問題有好奇心以及喜歡解決問題，並從解決問題中找到樂趣
• 具備基本電腦操作能力&會基礎的Linux語法操作

• 可接受輪班制度（早 / 中 / 夜班） 
➜ 無經驗可，我們會提供完整訓練與實務帶領！

【輪班制度】
• 提供完整 3 個月培訓期，培訓期間固定日班（09:00–18:00），協助穩定建立基礎能力
• 培訓期結束後進入輪班制度，輪班週期約 2–3 個月（依實際排班安排調整）
• 輪班期間皆有完善排班與休息安排，讓同仁能有足夠時間調整與恢復
• 我們重視工作與生活平衡，並提供輪班津貼與相關補助，支持長期穩定發展

中班：$41,000 起（含輪班津貼）
夜班：$48,000 起（含輪班 + 夜宵補助）.

額外津貼

職缺名稱: 【諮詢服務】資安轉型與數位風險諮詢 - 顧問/資深顧問
工作內容摘要:
在安永，你將擁有全球級的視野與資源，並在包容開放的文化中，打造與你一樣獨特的職業生涯，更提供讓你成為「市場稀缺人才」的加速器。加入我們，你將直接與頂尖專家並肩作戰。透過扁平化的指導機制，你將迅速解鎖大型企業的運作核心，深入參與最關鍵的數位與資安轉型戰役。告別單一領域的限制，我們將協助你成為市場上最炙手可熱的科技策略人才。

1. 數位風險評估與新興科技諮詢 (Digital Risk Assessment & Emerging Tech Advisory)
(1)新興科技診斷： 針對客戶的數位轉型關鍵領域（涵蓋雲端架構 Cloud、人工智慧(AI/GenAI/Agentic AI)等業務），設計客製化訪談架構並執行深度風險盤點。
(2)風險差異分析： 識別新技術應用中的資安盲點與合規斷層（如雲端風險、人工智慧風險），並運用國際標準與AI治理框架，提出具體且可落地的強化建議。

2. 資安轉型與治理標準化
(1)治理制度建立：透過新興科技的導入與應用建議，將碎片化的 IT 作業轉化為標準化的治理流程，奠定轉型基礎。
(2)流程自動化優化： 針對既有的資安運作流程進行優化 (Process Optimization)，開發自動化腳本或AI輔助工具，提升風險管理的效率與精準度。

3. 專案交付與知識賦能
(1)建立次世代顧問工作模式：參與團隊內部AI賦能計畫，優化與訓練AI協作工具，將AI工具整合顧問日常作業，與團隊共同定義高效交付標準。
(2)技術資產建構： 負責將複雜的技術發現，轉化為決策層可閱讀的風險評估報告或轉型建議。主動追蹤市場前沿議題（如 AI 安全、流程智能化），並將研究成果內化為團隊知識與客戶建議，持續提升團隊諮詢量能。

工作內容摘要:
【職位描述】
作為AI工程師，你將在我們的研發團隊中工作，負責開發和實施先進的人工智能解決方案。這個職位需要你在機器學習、深度學習和數據分析方面具備豐富的知識和經驗，並能夠將理論應用到實際的商業問題中。我們期待你能夠在技術上領導項目，並與跨功能團隊合作，共同推動公司的技術創新。我們特別歡迎對將AI應用於企業軟體中充滿興趣的候選人加入我們。

【工作內容】
1.AI解決方案開發：
●設計、開發和實施基於人工智慧的解決方案，以滿足客戶的具體需求。
●整合AI技術到現有的SAP和Oracle系統中，以提升系統效能和功能。

2.數據分析和挖掘：
●負責從大數據中提取、分析和挖掘信息，以支持客戶的業務決策和優化流程。
●開發和應用機器學習算法，以改進預測模型和自動化流程。

3.AI模型開發和優化：
●研究和實驗新的機器學習算法和模型，並將其應用於客戶問題的解決方案中。
●優化現有的AI模型和算法，以提升性能和準確性。

4.技術支持與整合：
●提供技術支持，協助客戶在使用AI解決方案時的問題解決和調試。
●整合AI解決方案到客戶的SAP和Oracle系統中，保證系統的兼容性和穩定性。

5.專案管理和協調：
●參與和協調AI項目的各個階段，包括需求分析、設計、開發、測試和部署。
●與客戶、內部團隊和第三方供應商協作，確保專案按時完成並符合要求。

6.技術研究和創新：
●追蹤和研究最新的AI技術和趨勢，並將其應用於實際項目中。
●提出和實驗新的技術解決方案，以提升公司在AI領域的競爭力和創新能力。

職缺名稱: LLT3-Global Manufacturing Strategy Engineer
工作內容摘要:
Company Overview

Wiwynn is a global cloud-enabling service company delivering end-to-end, integrated data center solutions. By working closely with customers and partners, Wiwynn provides optimized solutions with best-in-class total cost of ownership (TCO), tailored to specific workload requirements.
With capabilities ranging from board-level design to L11 rack integration, Wiwynn designs, assembles, customizes, tests, and validates systems prior to shipment, significantly reducing customer deployment time. Leveraging the Wistron Group’s global support infrastructure and an ODM Direct business model, Wiwynn enables scalable, highly customized solutions and delivers industry-leading global support.

About the job

The Manufacturing Test Engineer (MTE) team is responsible for enabling manufacturing capabilities that drive stable and reliable infrastructure through close collaboration with cross-functional teams. As a Manufacturing Test Engineer, you work closely with Software Test Engineering, Production Maneger, Design Engineering, Quality, and Operations teams to optimize testing flow, define test strategies, and jointly develop manufacturing processes and tools.
As production ramps, MTEs partner with factory and program stakeholders to ensure manufacturing processes are repeatable, well-controlled, and aligned with overall production and quality objectives. You collaborate across functions to define test infrastructure requirements, product specifications, and validation criteria, ensuring smooth execution from development through mass production.
In this role, you are responsible for developing, maintaining, and continuously improving test systems, while partnering with cross-functional and global teams to ensure test platforms remain stable, scalable, and operational. You will jointly manage the overall health of the test infrastructure and coordinate the deployment of test platform changes across worldwide sites.

Responsibilities

•	Ensure manufacturing test platforms meet current capability, stability, and reliability requirements across all production stages.
•	Collaborate with cross-functional engineering teams to define and execute executable manufacturing test strategies, test plans, and debug processes.
•	Continuously optimize manufacturing test solutions to reduce cycle time, improve test coverage, and enhance overall system reliability.
•	Lead root cause analysis for software and hardware issues encountered within manufacturing test processes, and drive effective corrective and preventive actions.
•	Act as the primary owner to initiate, track, and monitor action items, ensuring timely execution and alignment with manufacturing and quality objectives.

Minimum Qualifications

•	Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Quality Engineering, or a related field.
•	Experience with Linux and Windows operating systems and virtualization environments.
•	Hands-on experience troubleshooting build-related issues for NPI and mass production products.
•	Solid understanding of computer subsystems, component interfaces, and manufacturing test equipment.
•	Strong cross-functional communication and collaboration skills.
•	Proficiency with Microsoft Excel, Word, and PowerPoint.

職缺名稱: AI/Perception/Robotics Learning Engineer: 人工智慧／感知／機器人機器學習工程師
工作內容摘要:
1.開發電腦視覺方法、模型與演算法，用於高層次機器人操作指示、操控與協作。
2.設計並規劃完整的資料流，從感測器前處理到 DNN 模型的輸入與輸出。
3.主導模型開發生命週期，涵蓋資料準備、模型設計、訓練、測試到最終部署。
4.設計、實作並測試基於模仿學習 (Imitation Learning, IL/IM) 與強化學習 (Reinforcement Learning, RL) 的演算法，用於人形機器人、機械手臂與機械手之高自由度控制與複雜行為規劃。
5.建構並維護可擴展的深度學習與建模框架，處理大規模機器人資料集，確保效能、穩定性與靈活性。
6.設計 AI 模型並進行 模型轉移 (Design & Transfer)，包含模型壓縮、量化、蒸餾與跨平台移植，確保雲端、邊緣與嵌入式設備的高效運行。
7.整合多模態感測器（RGB Camera、Depth Camera、IMU、LiDAR、觸覺、力覺），建立可靠的感知系統。
8.開發並應用 RL 與 IL/IM 策略學習方法，支援高維度連續動作空間、動態環境與多樣操作場景。
9.探索 Sim2Real 技術，縮短模擬到真實的落地差距，確保在實體機器人上能穩定部署。
10.探索並應用新一代多模態 AI（VLM、VLA、Action Token），推動機器人從單純 “看懂” 到能夠 “理解並執行” 的智慧進化。
11.與跨領域團隊（機械、硬體、控制、雲端）合作，整合感知、決策與控制模組，並持續優化系統效能。

工作內容摘要:
我們正在尋找一位能獨立負責專案、制定檢測計畫，並協助團隊成員成長的資深工程師。
在這個職位中，你不僅會執行資安檢測，還需要參與流程設計與技術優化，成為團隊的核心技術顧問！

【工作內容】
1. 規劃並領導團隊成員完成 IoT、網通設備資安檢測專案

具備 OSCP、CPENT(LPT)、SSCP、CISSP 等證照者佳
5. 熟悉基本滲透測試流程，能獨立分析漏洞並提出修復建議
6. 能夠獨立規劃專案並解決複雜資安問題
7. 下列領域擇一，具備3年以上經驗：
- IoT、網通設備資安檢測
- 車載系統或嵌入式設備滲透測試
- 工控或工業物聯網資安評估

職缺名稱: LLTA-Global PCBA Manufacturing Strategy Engineer
工作內容摘要:
Company Overview

Wiwynn is a global cloud-enabling service company providing end-to-end, integrated data center solutions. Working closely with customers and partners, Wiwynn delivers optimized solutions with best-in-class TCO (total cost of ownership) tailored to unique workloads. With capabilities spanning from board-level design to L11 rack integration, Wiwynn designs, assembles, customizes, tests, and validates systems prior to shipment, significantly reducing customer deployment time. Leveraging the Wistron Group’s global support infrastructure and an ODM Direct business model, Wiwynn enables scalable, customized solutions and industry-leading support worldwide.

About the job

As a Wiwynn Manufacturing Test Engineer (MTE), you will serve as a core technical guardian within Wiwynn’s global supply chain ecosystem. This role focuses on the global test management of PCBA (Printed Circuit Board Assembly) facilities, ensuring that every server motherboard delivered meets the highest standards of reliability required for hyperscale data centers.
You will act as a vital bridge between technical diagnostics and international coordination. Beyond global production monitoring and quality control, you will leverage your technical expertise to perform Root Cause Analysis (RCA) on test related issues identified during manufacturing. Your mission is to drive yield improvement, optimize test efficiency, and reduce cycle times through innovative testing strategies. Furthermore, you will collaborate closely with world-class customers and downstream partners to maintain Wiwynn’s competitive edge in the rapidly evolving cloud infrastructure market.

Responsibilities

•	As a Manufacturing Test Engineer, you will develop and sustain test hardware and software to support the verification of product functionality following the assembly process of PCBAs.
•	Monitor production data to identify the MFG test related issues early while implementing continuous test process enhancements to ensure quality of product.
•	Perform root cause analysis of software and hardware failures occurring within the manufacturing test processes.
•	Develop, validate, and deploy scalable optimization plans for PCBA sites. Streamline manufacturing tests to shorten cycle time, cut hardware costs, and improve test coverage and system reliability.
•	Collaborate with manufacturing sites and customers to facilitate the transition from NPI to mass production.
•	Develops and maintains documentations on process and procedures within MTE team and with its internal partners.
•	Provide on-site support for manufacturing builds through domestic/international travel and flexible off-hours scheduling.

Minimum Qualifications

•	Bachelors or master’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Quality Engineering or related fields.
•	Understanding of the complete manufacturing process at the PCBA level.
•	Experience troubleshooting with engineering team on build related issues with products.
•	Experience of Linux/Windows OS/Virtualization operating
•	Working knowledge of computer subsystems, component interfaces, add-on boards, function test equipment, electronic test equipment.
•	Proficient in MS Excel/Word/Power Point applications or other related applications.
•	Excellent written and verbal English communication skills, with a proactive approach to client engagement and global team collaboration.
•	Quick learner and proven problem-solving ability.

工作內容摘要:
【About Appier】
Appier (TSE: 4180) is an AI-native Agentic AI as a Service (AaaS) company that empowers businesses to create value through cutting-edge AdTech and MarTech solutions. Founded in 2012 with the vision of “Making AI Easy by Making Software Intelligent,” Appier helps businesses turn AI into ROI through its Ad Cloud, Personalization Cloud, and Data Cloud—each powered by Agentic AI that enables autonomous, adaptive, and real-time decision-making. Today, Appier operates 17 offices across APAC, the US, and EMEA, and is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. Learn more at www.appier.com.

【About the role】
The primary role of the Campaign Analyst is to be the Strategic Pilot of AI – turning AI into ROI.

【Responsibilities】
- Manage and execute ad campaigns with Appier proprietary AI platform and products.
- Plan and manage multinational advertising campaigns, formulate localized advertising strategies.
- Analyze data and campaign performance, configure automated optimization processes, conduct experiments, ensuring client’s KPIs are met with precision and speed.
- Co-work with sales managers, account managers, product managers, data analysts and on various optimization-related projects.
- Adjust and improve the effectiveness of AI models. Improve overall performance of the system.

- AI & Tech Enthusiast: Tech early adopters. Loves exploring new AI tools to work faster and smarter. Always looking for ways to improve efficiency.

- Exposure to digital ad serving concepts (CPM/CPA/RTB/ROI), video, mobile, and social media is a plus.

工作內容摘要:
【團隊介紹】
我們是一個充滿熱情與創意的團隊，致力於結合科技與數據驅動保險業的創新變革。在這裡，你將與專業的技術與商業團隊協作，打造下一代智能解決方案，推動產險的數位轉型與智能化發展。

我們相信，未來的保險不僅僅是理賠和風險分攤，更是結合數據與AI技術實現全方位的風險預測與預防。

無論是車險理賠自動化、自然災害風險評估，還是風險預防方案，我們不僅在傳統產險領域引入前沿技術，也正在探索保險科技的無限可能。

如果你熱愛結合商業與技術，並希望將創意和洞察力轉化為可落地的AI解決方案，這裡將是你大展身手的最佳舞台！加入我們，與數據和科技共同塑造保險的未來！

【這份工作需要你/妳】
1. 聚焦商業問題，規劃數據專案與執行：以數據與AI應用為核心，深入了解產險業務需求，規劃並執行可落地的解決方案（例如AI Agent、機器學習預測模型等）。 
2. 數據技術應用與開發建置：
　● 調研AI 與新科技應用趨勢，協助規劃數據產品與專案方向。
　● 數據探索、模型與AI功能設計與開發，確保技術方案的實用性與可行性。
3. 跨部門協作與落地推動：與業務、技術及產品團隊密切合作，推動專案從規劃到落地的全流程執行。
4. 專案成果效益分析與優化：追蹤專案落地實施效果，確保用戶反饋與持續優化應用。

加入我們，讓你的商業洞察與AI熱情，共同推動保險業的智能化轉型！

作為資料科學家，需要對新技術保有高度熱誠，能夠歸納與統整大量的資料，並從中萃取出精華，發現未察覺的新知識。我們目前有多個利用生成式與因果AI平台衍生的產品線資料科學職缺, 包含:

建構數位雙生模型, 利用生成AI方法做情境模擬與A/B測試

3.新藥開發
建立NLP/LLM技術管線, 解讀結構和非結構文本以及組學資料
辨識藥物、基因與疾病之間的關聯
分析臨床試驗中重要的預測性生物標記

4.因果推論
開發能處理高維變量的先進因果模型, 包含causal discovery, causality assessment
應用在上述各現實場域

職缺名稱: 【藝珂Adecco_ CapABLE藝展長才】歡迎持身障證明的各類人才與我們聯繫，與您一起找到發揮專才的工作！正職/兼職/實習/轉職皆歡迎！
工作內容摘要:
**藝珂的使命是 Making the Future Work for Everyone為每個人找到工作未來！歡迎持身心障礙手冊專業人才主動投遞，我們希望能了解你的專長及需求，協助您一起找到能發揮專才的理想工作:)* 


【誰是藝珂?】

藝珂集團總部設於瑞士蘇黎世，為全球最大國際性人力資源服務公司。台灣藝珂成立於1989年，在台北、新竹、台中、台南和高雄皆設有服務據點，全台擁有近三百名專業顧問與職員，為台灣各產業及各規模企業提供多元的人才資源服務。台灣藝珂服務範疇涵蓋正職人才招募、人力派遣服務、外包管理服務、教育訓練與人才測評以及多元共融發展，旗下亦有Lee Hecht Harrison (LHH Taiwan) 子公司，提供企業領導力發展與職業轉型服務。憑藉著360度人力資源解決方案，台灣藝珂致力於實現「為每個人打造嶄新的職場新未來（Making the Future Work for Everyone）」之宗旨。 


【透過藝珂找工作的好處?】

藝珂擁有眾多客戶，涵蓋各種你想得到的、想不到的產業與職類，官網上每日平均有400-500個職缺正在招募！無論你是尋找全職、兼職或短期合約工作，藝珂都能提供多元的職缺選擇，讓你快速找到適合的工作機會。 

此外，藝珂顧問團隊將提供專業、客觀的建議，協助你量身打造履歷，並提供求職技巧，引導你做好面試前準備，提高找到理想工作機會。 

 
【徵才對象及職缺類別?】

* 企業內部人才：具行政、人資、財務、會計、行銷、企劃 之相關能力與經驗者 
* 對外服務人才：具總機、電話客服、業務、銷售、門市人員 之相關能力與經驗者 
* 技術人才：具資料分析、資訊、資管、程式語言 之相關能力與經驗者 

以上職缺包含代企業徵才及藝珂內部職缺，將於面談後依據專業能力進行推薦。
 

【這一切如何運作?】

請至以下連結填寫你的基本資料並上傳履歷（請勿透過104應徵，以加速我們的內部招募程序^^），在評估過你的現況後，我們將盡快與你聯繫。非常期待能與你一起發掘潛能，發展職涯道路、成就自己！

【Role Positioning for Global Young Talent】
This role is designed for early-career professionals who already have a solid technical foundation and are ready to take on greater ownership, system-level thinking, and global exposure in the power electronics products.

【Our Team】
Center of Core Competence (CCC) is a LITEON department for developing key technologies for future products. Especially we focus on the development of advanced technologies that were previously unavailable and serves as the company's technology leader, focusing on advanced hardware development and interdisciplinary technology integration.
By combining cyber‑physical integration and AI technologies, we drive innovative applications in power products and reinforce the company’s leadership in the power electronics domain.

【Job Description】
1、Advanced Power Converter Architecture Analysis & Design
Conduct analysis and design of next generation DC/DC and AC/DC converter architectures, including circuit operation, component stress & loss evaluation, control methods, and firmware control development.

2、Power & Magnetics Integration Technology Development
Develop new integrated magnetic components and planar magnetics, perform concept design and simulation validation, evaluate feasibility of magnetics converter co design, and secure innovation outcomes through patent applications.

3、PCB Parasitics & Thermal Integration Technology Development
Use ANSYS Q3D to analyze PCB parasitic parameters for power products, evaluate gate drive signal integrity and power loop loss, and perform thermal simulation with ANSYS Icepak. Collaborate with lab validation to assess PCB optimization effectiveness.

做為 Full‑Stack Engineer（AI/Algorithm Integration），你將參與產品的 端到端技術開發，包含 Web 全端開發、系統架構設計、演算法實作，以及 AI 工具與模型的串接。

職缺名稱: 【2026實習】AI數位孿生實習生_台達研究院(台北)
工作內容摘要:
2026台達實習招募熱烈進行中，歡迎你/妳與我們一起進步成長！

「台達研究院」(Delta Research Center, DRC)成立於2013年，為台達集團總部研發單位，除致力於大數據分析及物聯網應用與解決方案的開發與整合，加速企業轉型成功，也積極與產官學研生態體系協作，以開放創新模式，創造多贏生態圈。2022年台達研究院進入下一階段，專注於研發台達下下世代(next-next-generation)產品或解決方案之前瞻技術。
在「台達研究院」之下，團隊專注在模擬最佳化、機器人演算法、數位孿生建模與應用，發展具商業價值的AI應用與解決方案。

◎本職缺主要工作內容:
1. 以機器學習、深度學習、統計與作業研究等技術，分析內外部客戶資料，提供合適的解決方案。  
2. 研究與開發人工智慧之演算法、應用和服務。  
3. 設計、協助及管理資料分析及最佳化專案、培訓等業務推動 。 
4. 參與Smart Design, Smart Manufacturing/智慧製造, 節能最佳化等產業轉型相關專案。

暑期實習（2026/7/6~2026/8/31）

碩一（含）以上

【工作內容與核心任務】
SRE 服務可靠性工程師，站在能夠綜覽 Dev & Ops 兩端的視野，以流程及監控等技術，提升優化整體的服務可靠性：
．服務維運：掌握雲端 production 環境的特性，以 SLO 角度協助各產品團隊辨識優化服務品質的方向。
．軟體工程：掌握軟體研發的流程與工具，以自動化角度協助產品團隊優化 DX (developer experience)。
．監控系統：量測並監控軟體服務品質，協助各產品團隊具備掌握服務品質指標、及時應變劇本、經驗傳承的能力。
．自動化：撰寫雲端工具程式，善用雲端平台，以自動化機制確保服務品質。
．系統架構：掌握 well-architected 分散式軟體架構，協助自動擴展服務元件，並將最佳實務內嵌至系統中。

【團隊文化】
．扁平化的組織架構，適才適所、能發揮自己對技術的想法。
．就事論事、用數據及事實溝通。
．隨時歡迎提出建議及看法、達成共識後即快速執行、遇到問題也願意共同面對並解決。
．技術及非技術的分享會、讀書會、專題講座，希望大家都能跟著公司一起前進成長。

【我們正在尋找的夥伴】
．具有 Larry Wall 所說的三大特質：Laziness、Impatience、Hubris，並樂於以自動化手法捍衛這種特質。
．擁抱 DevOps 講究的 CALMS (culture, automation, lean, measurement, sharing) 五大工作面向。
．喜歡分散式系統，覺得照顧著大規模大流量系統正常運作，並以系統化方式持續優化它，是一件很酷的事。
．喜歡持續優化自己及團隊的工作流程。
．想挑戰自我的能力，願意嘗試在快節奏的公司工作。
．Growth mindset：對於學習新語言、新工具、新平台、新領域、新做事方法抱持開放態度，對團隊的最大利益負責，也對自己工程師職涯的競爭力負責。
．Data-driven：喜歡用數字（業務面數據及工程面數據）來驗證工作成效，而不是只是憑感覺。
．溝通能力佳，喜歡團隊合作更勝一人球隊。

工作內容摘要:
Wiwynn is an innovative cloud IT infrastructure provider of high-quality computing and storage products, as well as rack-level solutions for leading data centers. The System Optical Interconnect Engineering Intern will support next-generation data center technology exploration at Wiwynn HQ. The intern will assist engineering teams in research, analysis, and system-level evaluation of emerging optical interconnect technologies, including CPO-related solutions, for future AI/HPC server and networking systems. This role is suitable for graduate students interested in optical interconnects, photonics technologies, and system-level architecture for next-generation data center infrastructure.

Internship Period：06/29-08/28

【Essential Job Functions】
1. Conduct analysis and research on next-generation data center optical interconnect and photonic transmission technologies
2. Perform literature reviews, technology comparisons, and data analysis related to optical and high-speed interconnect technologies
3. Support engineering teams in evaluating optical technologies and system architecture implications for AI/HPC infrastructure
4. Participate in internal CPO project weekly meetings and collaborate with a mentor to identify and work on an optimization topic during the internship
5. Assist in preparing technical summaries, presentations, and documentation
6. Collaborate with cross-functional teams when needed (EE / ME / SI / Networking)

【Internship Highlights】
1. Explore your future career path in the technology industry while gaining valuable workplace experience.
2. Be paired with a dedicated mentor to quickly understand team operations and develop in-depth professional knowledge.
3. Engage in discussions with experienced professionals to identify your strengths and areas for growth.
4. Participate in internal projects to gain hands-on industry and practical work experience, collaborate with cross-functional talents, and develop essential career soft skills.
5. Outstanding interns may be given priority opportunities for semester-long internships or full-time positions after graduation.

【Internship Benefits】
1. Enjoy the same employee benefits as full-time staff.
2. Receive comprehensive training programs and structured learning support.
3. Benefit from a leave policy that exceeds legal requirements.
4. Participate in a wide range of internal company events and activities.

▋ 關於德州儀器
德州儀器(TI)是位居類比晶片世界領導地位的半導體設計與製造公司，持續提供創新及頂尖的半導體技術與產品，協助客戶開發最先進的電子產品。除此之外，TI也針對在校學生及初入社會新鮮人設計完整的培訓制度與挑戰性的工作內容，並提供具競爭力的薪資與福利、完善的升遷管、輪調培訓計畫以及活潑與國際化的工作環境。 

▋ TI輪調培訓計畫
TI針對新鮮人提供全面且扎實的系列培訓課程，透過課堂及工作日常的任務，將TI的核心理念傳達給新人。另外，TI亦提供完整的輪調計劃，透過給予新人不同職務內容的學習，使其能在公司有更多成長及發展的機會。
歡迎至TI職涯官網  http://careers.ti.com/taiwan/ 搜尋更多相關內容。
 
We can't predict what the future holds, but we know Texas Instruments will have a part in shaping it.

Are you looking to grow your career in manufacturing processing at one of the leading semiconductor companies in the world? Put your knowledge and background to work at Texas Instruments (TI) as a Manufacturing Process Engineer.

 
▋Responsibilities include:

-Drive tool stability improvement project from both process parameter and equipment mechanism perspective. 
-Establish SOP and optimize process flow to strengthen production robustness. 
-Qualify new process parameter and hardware retrofit thru process deep dive or cross function collaboration. 
-Initiate cost reduction project by sourcing, tooling modification or parts life time extension thru close work with buyers and vendors. 
-Support production output arrangement include normal production and special working request order. 
-Work with quality team to define containment action and focus on root cause study for quality event. 

▋Why TI?

Engineer your future. We empower our employees to truly own their career and development. Come collaborate with some of the smartest people in the world to shape the future of electronics.
We’re different by design. Diverse backgrounds and perspectives are what push innovation forward and what make TI stronger. We value each and every voice, and look forward to hearing yours.  Meet the people of TI.
Benefits that benefit you. We offer competitive pay and benefits designed to help you and your family live your best life. Your well-being is important to us.
About Texas Instruments.

As a global semiconductor company, we design, manufacture, test and sell analog and embedded processing chips to nearly 100,000 customers. Our products enable electronics everywhere and in things you experience every day .
 from health care, smart homes and connected cars to drones, smart phones and more. Our passion to create a better and more sustainable world by making electronics more affordable through semiconductors drives us to make our technology smaller, more efficient, more reliable and more affordable.

「台達研究院」成立於2013年，由各領域專家組成，專注於研發台達下下世代 (next-next-generation) 產品之前瞻技術，開發新一代的創新產品，在台北、台南等地設有研發實驗室，加速了解產業需求、驗證技術與解決方案的多面向整合。

我們致力於協助建構企業級的軟體與韌體開發輔助工具 (Coding Copilot)，研發、設計並實作各式 AI Agents 來提升軟、韌體的品質與開發效率。工作將橫跨 LLM 微調、Agent 架構設計、最新技術的調研與實作，以及服務架構的建置與維運，打造真正落地的 AI 工具鏈。

• 方法不設限：用各種創新方法解決真實痛點，挑戰沒有標準答案的問題

1.熟悉遊戲/模擬系統的 AI 架構(GOAP、Utility AI、Behavior Tree)。

工作內容摘要:
（一）協助辦理觀光及相關產業之研究與分析，包含永續觀光（SDGs）、城市與觀光議題、循環經濟及觀光永續發展等相關議題。
（二）協助辦理觀光與地方產業發展相關研究，包含產業與觀光發展、交通與旅遊規劃、城市觀光品牌、地方創生及觀光再造發展等議題。
（三）協助辦理觀光產業經濟與市場研究，包含觀光產值估算、觀光衛星帳（Tourism Satellite Account, TSA）、投入產出模型分析、旅遊消費行為、觀光產業經濟效益及觀光行銷傳播等研究。
（四）協助辦理數位觀光與媒體傳播相關研究，包含新媒體與自媒體在觀光行銷之應用、跨媒體整合行銷、觀光資訊傳播、數位平台及資通訊（ICT）於觀光產業之發展與應用研究。
（五）協助辦理觀光及相關產業之市場與趨勢分析，包含健康觀光、休閒旅遊、文化觀光及相關產業（如住宿、餐飲、交通等）之產業分析與創新策略研究。
（六）運用質化與量化研究方法及大數據分析，進行資料蒐集、數據整理、歸納分析與研究報告撰寫，並提供政策建議及產業發展策略。
（七）運用研究成果進行政策分析、產業策略研擬、標案提案論述及研究成果加值應用，促進觀光產業發展與政策決策參考。
（八）具備跨領域整合能力，能進行跨部門協調、資源整合及趨勢洞察，提出前瞻性觀光發展策略建議。

本職位是公司深度研究以及市場趨勢分析的重要角色，將為公司提供重要的專業諮詢服務，並有機會參與多項具有挑戰性的研究專案，對於觀光相關議題有興趣的人士不可錯過。歡迎有興趣的人士應徵此職位，並提供您的履歷表及求職信以供參考。

職缺名稱: Sr. Software Engineer [map infrastructure & pipeline]
工作內容摘要:
About the Role

You will play a key role in building the map infrastructure that enables vision-based localization for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) in GNSS-challenged environments. This role focuses on turning satellite/aerial imagery into a scalable, deployable onboard “feature map” database (embeddings + geo metadata + indices) that supports visual place recognition, robust online matching, and global position estimation.

You will work closely with AI, localization, and embedded/platform engineers to ensure the map database is not only correct and scalable, but also retrieval-ready for real flight conditions and onboard constraints (storage, memory, latency, load time, and update reliability). Your work spans the full lifecycle of map engineering — from data ingestion and processing to feature map generation, validation, packaging, release management, and long-term maintenance.

Responsibilities

[Geospatial Data Ingestion & Normalization]

- Build and maintain automated pipelines to ingest satellite/aerial imagery from multiple sources and normalize formats, resolutions, and geo metadata.
- Define tiling strategies, pyramid/multi-scale schemes, and data partitioning to support different operating conditions and coverage requirements.
- Ensure reproducible processing with full traceability (data source, parameters, software version, outputs, and release artifacts).

[Feature Map Generation & Artifact Management]

- Build and maintain a reproducible pipeline to apply feature extraction models to imagery tiles and generate feature-map artifacts (embeddings + geo metadata) for deployment.
- Define artifact formats and storage layouts that are robust, efficient, and suitable for onboard consumption.
- Establish artifact governance: manifests, integrity checks, build audits, and release documentation.
- Support region-level packaging and incremental update mechanisms for field deployment, with clear version alignment across map artifacts and runtime software components.

[Localization Support & Retrieval Readiness]

- Collaborate with localization engineers to define map structures, metadata, and constraints that improve online matching robustness (search space constraints, candidate filtering, confidence estimation, and failure recovery behaviors).
- Provide map-side signals and tooling to connect map design choices to localization performance (match stability, geo error outcomes, ambiguity patterns).
- Support evaluation workflows that diagnose failure modes and guide improvements (e.g., ambiguous regions, low-texture tiles, repetitive patterns).

[Geospatial Integrity, Quality Gates & Validation]

- Own coordinate conversions and geo metadata definitions to ensure integrity across the pipeline (projections, reference frames, boundary conditions).
- Implement automated validation checks for geo correctness, dataset consistency, coverage, and tile-level quality.
- Define map quality gates and acceptance criteria aligned with product requirements and localization KPIs.

[Indexing, Onboard Packaging & Performance]

- Design and optimize data layouts and indices for efficient onboard access and retrieval under storage/memory/latency constraints.
- Collaborate with embedded/platform teams to meet performance requirements (load time, query latency, memory footprint) and reliability requirements (safe updates, rollback, corruption handling).
- Maintain compatibility across map bundles, indices, and onboard runtime components through disciplined versioning and release practices.

[Diagnostics, Tooling, Monitoring & Maintenance]

- Build debugging and visualization tools for map inspection, build auditing, and failure triage (coverage analytics, ambiguity detection, match failure patterns).
- Maintain map lifecycle management: versioning rules, reproducible builds, release notes, rollback strategy, and regression tests.
- Document pipeline design decisions, operational playbooks, and maintenance guidelines for long-term support.

職缺名稱: 專任研究助理(馬偉雲老師實驗室中研院詞庫小組CKIP)
工作內容摘要:
我們利用深度學習 (Deep Learning) 從事文字生成、聊天機器人、知識建構與推論、自然語言處理的研究，兼顧理論與應用，具體研發項目如下：

1. 廣告文案或新聞的自動生成
當輸入是一款手機的規格表，系統能自動生成出一篇具有說服力的廣告文案。或是當輸入是一場 NBA 的比賽數據表，系統能自動生成出一篇緊張刺激的播報新聞。我們希望透過深度學習當中的增強式學習 (Reinforcement Learning) 以及語言模型，打造一個這樣的文字生成系統，能夠一方面忠於輸入的表格內容，另一方面能發揮創造力，寫出多變化又文情並茂的文章。

2. 不限主題的閒聊機器人
即所謂 Chitchat Chatbot，也就是沒有特定目的的聊天。目前這類型的bot大多數的作法是利用深度學習當中的 Seq-to-Seq model來建構，但是，這樣的作法通常無法產生有意義或是較為深入的回應，多數會流於插瞌打渾或是賣萌。其中的關鍵，在於bot缺少了對於聊天主題相關的基本常識，就像是 user 要跟 bot 討論劉德華，bot 應該對劉德華的各個 fact（身份，作品⋯）有足夠認識，回的 response 才會豐富有意義，不然巧婦難為無米之炊，沒有知識就不容易產生有意義的回應，我們希望將 grounded knowledge 以及更豐富的語義訊息 encode 在 model 之中。我們透過深度學習當中的增強式學習 (Reinforcement Learning)，已經訓練出一個不限主題的 LINE 閒聊機器人——詞庫小妍（LINE官方帳號：@359mcmgs）。

3. 自動知識學習系統
我們知道新的知識會夜以繼日的不斷產生，一個具有 AI 能力的系統最重要的功能之一就是能夠從大量的資料當中，分析資料，加以理解，組織成結構化知識。我們實驗室過去已經開發了人類的知識網 (E-HowNet)，打下堅實基礎，此專案的目標是進一步加以擴張，利用深度學習技術將關鍵的關係三元組合從閱讀的文章中自動抽取出來，如 (“哈登”, MemberOf, “火箭隊”) 或 (“麥特載蒙”, PlayerOf, “心靈捕手”) 等等。

4. 事實推論或事件預測系統
對於一個新事物，人們往往會根據基本常識、已知的事實、經驗的法則等等進行新事物的推測，包含事實或是事件的推論，例如以下的事實推論：已知Ａ說中文，Ａ又是Ｂ的哥哥，那麼很高的機Ｂ也會說中文。又例如以下的事件推論：“買麵包” 後會有很高的機率會在近期 “吃麵包”。在一個龐大的文本或是複雜的知識圖譜當中，推論的關係往往數量龐大，有時甚至複雜到超越人力所能規範與理解，我們希望藉由深度學習技術能自動化的在文本或是知識圖譜當中進行新事物的推測。
公司名稱: 中央研究院資訊科學研究所

六、法遵與風險控管

•	設計風險分級與自動標記機制

________________________________________
七、系統整合與企業落地

o	文件管理系統（DMS） 
o	合約管理系統（CMS） 
o	ERP / workflow 系統 
•	設計 API 與自動化流程（審批、版本流轉） 
________________________________________
八、模型優化與治理（AI Governance）
•	Prompt engineering 與效能優化 
•	建立回答品質評估機制（accuracy / hallucination control） 
•	設計 AI 使用規範與風險控管機制 
•	使用 OpenAI API 或其他 LLM 平台進行整合與優化

工作內容摘要:
【主要工作內容】
作為軟體工程師，你將會開發各種程式與打造數位工具，協助房仲省下大量的作業時間也會與團隊一起發掘、優化公司內部流程。會接觸自動化流程、網頁服務、APP或聊天機器人系統等各種有趣的程式，並使用最先進的技術，與團隊持續推出最強的解決方案，成為 foundi 領先市場的重要推手。

1~3 個月內，你將會：
- 了解公司願景、使命和未來規劃
- 理解各部門負責項目，以及客戶和行政部門的專業內容
- 參與 foundi 教育訓練，培養產品及市場的知識，與團隊攜手制定個人發展目標
- 參與基礎訓練，培養 foundi 軟體工程師的獨門工程思維
- 透過新手專案熟悉 codebase 和開發環境
- 選擇有興趣的領域著手解決簡單的 bugs

3~6 個月後，你將會：
- 解決更多更具挑戰性的 bugs，藉此熟悉程式的不同部分
- 微調系統，優化程式細節
- 制訂個人 OKR 和成長目標，讓自己持續成長
- 參與設計和實作不同規模的專案，和資深工程師一起討論、打造堅強產品

【加入團隊】
foundi 的創辦人是前 Google 資深工程師，因此特別注重程式的品質。身為團隊的一員，你的首要任務就是理解問題、提出合適的解決方案和確保實作的可讀性和正確性。你會學習如何寫出更易讀、有效率的程式碼，也會學到如何思考、架構解決方案，滿足市場短、中、長期的需求。你會不斷精進成長，成為世界級的軟體工程師，打造改變產業的關鍵產品。

職缺名稱: 資安評估處-資深 IoT 資安檢測工程師 (林口)
工作內容摘要:
我們正在尋找一位能獨立負責專案、制定檢測計畫，並協助團隊成員成長的資深工程師。
在這個職位中，你不僅會執行資安檢測，還需要參與流程設計與技術優化，成為團隊的核心技術顧問！

【工作內容】
1. 規劃並領導團隊成員完成 IoT、網通設備資安檢測專案
2. 執行車載元件或系統滲透測試
3. 參與 ISO 17025 實驗室品質系統維運、優化檢測流程並擔任報告簽署人或技術主管等角色
4. 研究新的國際資安標準、法規與技術、制定檢測手法並優化檢測流程
5. 透過教育訓練與經驗分享，提升團隊內部技術能量
6. 協助與客戶/發政單位進行溝通協調，確保專案順利推進並符合相關標準及規範。

【必要資格】
1. TOEIC 550 分以上或同等英文能力（需能閱讀英文技術文件）
2. 熟練 Linux 操作與 TCP/IP 網路協議分析
3. 熟悉多種資安檢測工具與方法（如 nmap、Nessus、Burp Suite、Acunetix 等）
4. 依據「數發部資安署」公告之《資通安全專業證照清單》，需具備 2 張技術類證照，或 1 張管理類 + 1 張技術類證照；
具備 OSCP、CPENT(LPT)、SSCP、CISSP 等證照者佳
5. 熟悉基本滲透測試流程，能獨立分析漏洞並提出修復建議
6. 能夠獨立規劃專案並解決複雜資安問題
7. 下列領域擇一，具備3年以上經驗：
- IoT、網通設備資安檢測
- 車載系統或嵌入式設備滲透測試
- 工控或工業物聯網資安評估

【備註】
此職務前期須先進新店辦公室進行培訓，熟悉業務並判斷可獨立作業後，方可與主管申請至林口辦公

-與網路、資安、DevOps 團隊密切合作，提高整體架構的可靠度。

【技能】
1.Kubernetes、Docker 平台操作與維運

【知識】

This is an opportunity for students and researchers in quantitative finance, behavioral finance, and statistics to apply these techniques to solve niche practical investment challenges specific to a platform of equity portfolio managers.

職缺名稱: Engineering Manager - Ubuntu Hardware Certification Quality and Test Engineering
工作內容摘要:
Canonical is a leading provider of open source software and operating systems to the global enterprise and technology markets. Our platform, Ubuntu, is very widely used in breakthrough enterprise initiatives such as public cloud, data science, AI, engineering innovation and IoT. Our customers include the world's leading public cloud and silicon providers, and industry leaders in many sectors. The company is a pioneer of global distributed collaboration, with 1200+ colleagues in 75+ countries and very few office based roles. Teams meet two to four times yearly in person, in interesting locations around the world, to align on strategy and execution.

The company is founder led, profitable and growing.

We are hiring an Engineering Manager for Ubuntu Hardware Certification Quality Engineering, to lead the team responsible for the test suites which validate hardware compatibility with Ubuntu Linux (Core, Desktop and Server – see https://ubuntu.com/certified for more information). We work together with silicon companies, OEMs, ODMs and teams within Canonical to ensure a smooth, secure out of the box Ubuntu experience, with success in this role leading to a great Ubuntu experience being offered on more and more devices.

As the Engineering Manager of the Certification Quality team you’ll lead a dedicated testing team, shaping the vision and setting the pace, in collaboration with the rest of the Certification and hardware enablement teams. You will lead the certification test strategy for Canonical’s PC OEM and ODM partnerships, including Advantech, ASUS, Dell, HP,  and Lenovo, deepening the test coverage for both new and existing certified hardware. You will pioneer the use of Canonical’s open source test frameworks and custom designed hardware to drive automated hardware validation of the operating system. This is a challenging position for a quality focused engineering leader, and requires an analytical mind with a passion for test automation and team leadership.

Location: This role will be office based in Taipei Minsheng district, Taiwan.

This role entails
- Lead the development and maintenance of Canonical’s hardware certification test suite
- Manage timely delivery of certifications as part of the hardware certification programmes
- Work collaboratively to ensure continuous improvement of test practices and tools
- Build and lead a globally distributed team of engineers
- Develop talent through coaching, mentoring, feedback and hands-on career development
- Set and manage expectations with other engineering teams, senior management, and external stakeholders
- Be an active part of the leadership team and collaborate with other leaders in the organisation
- Participate in strong engineering process through code, test plan, architectural reviews
- Engage with teams at Canonical, the open source community and commercial partners
- International travel twice per year for company events up to two weeks long

What we are looking for in you
- Knowledge of low-level embedded software and hardware - BIOS, firmware, bootloaders, ACPI, devicetree, kernel, RTOS
- A good understanding of Linux system architecture
- Knowledge of quality and reliability oriented engineering practices
- Exceptional academic track record from both high school and university
- Undergraduate degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or another technical subject
- Leadership and commitment to skills development and mentorship
- Confidence to respectfully speak up, exchange feedback, and share ideas without hesitation
- Track record of going above-and-beyond expectations to achieve outstanding results
- Track record of delivery of timely, high quality software
- Passion for technology evidenced by personal projects and initiatives
- The work ethic and confidence to shine alongside motivated colleagues
- Professional written and spoken English with excellent presentation skills
- Experience with Linux (Debian or Ubuntu preferred)

職缺名稱: AI-native MA
工作內容摘要:
【關於我們：為什麼選擇 TapPay？】
TapPay 是亞太地區領先的支付技術公司，致力於打造最流暢、安全的數位支付生態。身為 FinTech 的先驅，我們深信未來的競爭力將全面建立在「AI-first」的思維上。這不是一個傳統的儲備幹部計畫，我們正在尋找一群將 AI 視為「大腦延伸」的頂尖人才，與我們一起重構支付產業。

【什麼是 AI-native MA？】
我們不要求你一定要是 AI 工程師，但我們要求你具備「AI 優先」的解決問題能力。
身為 AI-native MA，你將會跨足產品開發、商務拓展、維運管理等部門，你的任務是利用 LLMs、自動化工具與數據分析，將 AI 深度整合進我們的產品流程與商業決策中。

【主要職責與工作內容】
1. AI 賦能業務流程 (Process Re-engineering)： 重新審視現有工作流程（如客戶支援、合規審查、市場研究），導入 AI 工具實踐流程自動化，提升 10 倍效率。
2. AI 產品原型開發 (AI Product Prototyping)： 與產品團隊協作，探索將 AI 技術（如預測性建模、防範詐欺分析、智能對話）整合進 TapPay 支付解決方案的可能性。
3. 跨部門學習 (Rotational Learning)： 在 12-18 個月的計畫中，深入 FinTech 的核心環節，包括支付閘道、金融法規、風控系統及海外市場開發。
4. 數據驅動決策 (Data-Driven Insight)： 利用數據分析工具與 AI 預測模型，協助高層制定市場擴展與技術發展策略。

【我們在找這樣的你：應徵資格】
• AI 狂熱者： 熟悉 ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney 或各類開源 AI 工具，並能實質展示這些工具如何優化你的學習或工作效率。
• 問題解決者： 具備邏輯清晰的思考力，能從混亂的資訊中抽絲剝繭，找出痛點並提出數位化解決方案。
• 高度適應力： 擁抱快速變動的 FinTech 環境，具備持續自學新技術的熱誠。
• 卓越溝通力： 具備流利的英文聽說讀寫能力（多益 850 分以上或同等證明），能與跨國團隊有效協作。
• 學歷背景： 國內外大學/研究所不限科系畢業（應屆畢業生或 2 年以下工作經驗）。具備資管、資工、商管或數據分析背景者佳。
公司名稱: 喬睿科技股份有限公司

職缺名稱: PCBA Manufacturing Testing Engineering
工作內容摘要:
Company Overview

Wiwynn is a global cloud-enabling service company providing end-to-end, integrated data center solutions. Working closely with customers and partners, Wiwynn delivers optimized solutions with best-in-class TCO (total cost of ownership) tailored to unique workloads. With capabilities spanning from board-level design to L11 rack integration, Wiwynn designs, assembles, customizes, tests, and validates systems prior to shipment, significantly reducing customer deployment time. Leveraging the Wistron Group’s global support infrastructure and an ODM Direct business model, Wiwynn enables scalable, customized solutions and industry-leading support worldwide.

About the job

As a Wiwynn Manufacturing Test Engineer (MTE), you act as the technical guardian of global PCBA manufacturing. This role is responsible for global test management across motherboard production, ensuring server reliability standards for hyperscale data centers. You bridge technical diagnostics and cross-site coordination, perform Root Cause Analysis on test issues, and drive yield improvement, test efficiency optimization, and cycle time reduction. Through close collaboration with global customers and supply chain partners, you help sustain Wiwynn’s competitiveness in the cloud infrastructure market.

Responsibilities

•	As a Manufacturing Test Engineer, you will develop and sustain test hardware and software to support the verification of product functionality following the assembly process of PCBAs.
•	Monitor production data to identify the MFG test related issues early while implementing continuous test process enhancements to ensure quality of product.
•	Perform root cause analysis of software and hardware failures occurring within the manufacturing test processes.
•	Develop, validate, and deploy scalable optimization plans for PCBA sites. Streamline manufacturing tests to shorten cycle time, cut hardware costs, and improve test coverage and system reliability.
•	Collaborate with manufacturing sites and customers to facilitate the transition from NPI to mass production.
•	Develops and maintains documentations on process and procedures within MTE team and with its internal partners.
•	Provide on-site support for manufacturing builds through domestic/international travel and flexible off-hours scheduling..

Minimum Qualifications

•	Bachelors or master’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Quality Engineering or related fields.
•	Understanding of the complete manufacturing process at the PCBA level.
•	Experience troubleshooting with engineering team on build related issues with products.
•	Experience of Linux/Windows OS/Virtualization operating
•	Working knowledge of computer subsystems, component interfaces, add-on boards, function test equipment, electronic test equipment.
•	Proficient in MS Excel/Word/Power Point applications or other related applications.
•	Excellent written and verbal English communication skills, with a proactive approach to client engagement and global team collaboration.
•	Quick learner and proven problem-solving ability.

Career Opportunities and Benefits

• Tier 1 Client Collaboration ── Work closely with industry-leading Tier 1 clients to gain firsthand experience with cutting-edge AI systems and advanced hardware including GPUs, ASICs, FPGAs...etc.
• Global Exposure & Travel ── Collaborate with diverse global teams and enjoy opportunities for domestic and international travel to experience local cultures firsthand.
• Flexible Hybrid Work ── Following successful completion of the probation period, work-from-home arrangements and flexible working hours may be offered subject to performance and role requirements.
• Choice of Workstation ── Select between high-performance Mac or Windows laptops as your primary tool to suit your development preferences.

職缺名稱: 2026 Turing Plan 儲備AI後端工程師 - 百萬年薪 熱烈開放申請中！
工作內容摘要:
【計畫介紹】
Turing Plan 以計算機之父 Alan Mathison Turing 為名，尋找最頂尖的技術研發落地與科研專案管理菁英。本計畫在職培訓為期兩年，期間年薪百萬起，以人工智慧技術為核心，打造多元金融場景的科技應用，並有機會參與科技策略的制定，推動集團未來的科技發展！於培訓過程中累積實戰經驗，探索個人興趣與專精領域，培訓結束後在原崗位持續深化專精領域，並將成果導入集團各大業務體系，創造實質影響。團隊迄今已上線數十個科技專案，如票據辨識、盜刷防詐、投資水晶球、iWish 等。 

【角色說明】
本職位以系統開發與部署為核心，工作內容涵蓋系統設計、服務開發、CI/CD、監控等，並持續關注系統架構與 DevOps 等工程技術趨勢。同時負責圖靈團隊自己的平台工程(platform engineering)，包含開發平台的規畫、建置與維運。本職位不以技術研究為主要職責，但需具備足夠的研究能力以持續精進自身的工程技術。此外，視需求參與團隊策略規畫等幕僚工作，協助擬定全集團科技策略方向(如 AI、資料策略等) 。

【工作內容】
1.後端應用系統規劃與開發  
  ．規劃與開發以 AI 模型 / Agent 流程為核心的應用系統 
  ．負責 API 設計、服務開發與系統整合，確保程式碼品質 
2.系統架構規劃與跨角色溝通  
  ．評估系統複雜度與技術風險，規劃整體系統架構 
  ．與專案負責人協作，協調應用開發與系統整合的開發時程與技術分工 
3.團隊內部平台工程(platform engineering)與系統維運  
  ．規劃並實作 CI/CD pipeline，涵蓋建置、測試、部署與回復機制 
  ．建立團隊內系統監控、紀錄與告警機 制，並負責日常維運與故障排除 
  ．研發團隊內部專屬平台，提供開發者導向的技術環境 
4.Agentic 應用架構評估與導入  
  ．調研與導入 Agentic 應用架構，涵蓋編排框架、工具整合與可觀測性等 
  ．建立 Agentic 應用架構的維運流程，追蹤系統效能、穩定性與服務品質 
5.分享技術知識，提升團隊專業能力  
  ．透過內部技術分享、文件撰寫與教學，促進知識交流並提升團隊技術能力 
  ．作為技術顧問，向公司內部單位提供技術建議與應用諮詢

台北或台南擇一，面試地點將與工作地點相同

About the Business

Unlock the power of your data. Deloitte's AI and Data services uncover relationships between business insights and organizational intelligence to drive progress for organization. We do this by leveraging the power of analytics, robotics, and artificial intelligence (AI) to generate the insights that catalyze growth and efficiencies. This helps your organization improve decision-making, increase operational efficiency, mitigate risk, and more.

Actuarial & Insurance
The actuarial function is a core component of any insurance operation. Retirement benefit is also typically part of an essential package of employee benefits. In these areas, actuarial capability is required. Actuaries also expand their quantitative skills into the advanced data analytics to provide insights into underwriting, claims management, risk management and human resources management.

職缺名稱: AI-native MA
工作內容摘要:
【關於我們：為什麼選擇 TapPay？】
TapPay 是亞太地區領先的支付技術公司，致力於打造最流暢、安全的數位支付生態。身為 FinTech 的先驅，我們深信未來的競爭力將全面建立在「AI-first」的思維上。這不是一個傳統的儲備幹部計畫，我們正在尋找一群將 AI 視為「大腦延伸」的頂尖人才，與我們一起重構支付產業。

【什麼是 AI-native MA？】
我們不要求你一定要是 AI 工程師，但我們要求你具備「AI 優先」的解決問題能力。
身為 AI-native MA，你將會跨足產品開發、商務拓展、維運管理等部門，你的任務是利用 LLMs、自動化工具與數據分析，將 AI 深度整合進我們的產品流程與商業決策中。

【主要職責與工作內容】
1. AI 賦能業務流程 (Process Re-engineering)： 重新審視現有工作流程（如客戶支援、合規審查、市場研究），導入 AI 工具實踐流程自動化，提升 10 倍效率。
2. AI 產品原型開發 (AI Product Prototyping)： 與產品團隊協作，探索將 AI 技術（如預測性建模、防範詐欺分析、智能對話）整合進 TapPay 支付解決方案的可能性。

• 問題解決者： 具備邏輯清晰的思考力，能從混亂的資訊中抽絲剝繭，找出痛點並提出數位化解決方案。

職缺名稱: 60036X0_AI 工程師（決策導向／平台型系統）
工作內容摘要:
職務定位：
我們尋找的不是傳統意義上的「模型工程師」，而是能理解 AI 在企業中應被如何使用、何被限制、如何被治理 的工程人才，以及目前 AI 為何在企業實施的挑戰。
在本職位中，AI 並非最終決策者，而是受限制、可追蹤、可被人監控的決策輔助角色。

我們相信：能限制 AI 的工程師，才是真正成熟的 AI 工程師。

工作內容：
１、設計與實作 決策導向的 AI 系統與應用流程
２、定義 AI 可介入與不可介入的 決策界線
３、將業務規則、角色與情境轉化為 AI 可理解與遵循的結構
４、與前端、後端、資料團隊協作，確保 AI 行為符合治理原則
５、設計 AI 的拒答、上報（human escalation）與回溯機制
６、參與 AI 行為、責任與系統架構的設計討論

我們重視的能力（比技術更重要）：
１、能清楚說明「AI 什麼時候不該說話」
２、能設計人與 AI 的責任分工
３、能接受 AI 被限制、被拒絕、被回溯
４、能為長期可治理的系統負責

我們不追求 AI 做得越多越好，而是追求它做得「剛剛好、做得對」。

※工作待遇：將依學經歷進行敘薪。
公司名稱: 神通資訊科技股份有限公司

職缺名稱: PCBA Manufacturing Testing Engineering
工作內容摘要:
Company Overview

Wiwynn is a global cloud-enabling service company providing end-to-end, integrated data center solutions. Working closely with customers and partners, Wiwynn delivers optimized solutions with best-in-class TCO (total cost of ownership) tailored to unique workloads. With capabilities spanning from board-level design to L11 rack integration, Wiwynn designs, assembles, customizes, tests, and validates systems prior to shipment, significantly reducing customer deployment time. Leveraging the Wistron Group’s global support infrastructure and an ODM Direct business model, Wiwynn enables scalable, customized solutions and industry-leading support worldwide.

About the job

As a Wiwynn Manufacturing Test Engineer (MTE), you act as the technical guardian of global PCBA manufacturing. This role is responsible for global test management across motherboard production, ensuring server reliability standards for hyperscale data centers. You bridge technical diagnostics and cross-site coordination, perform Root Cause Analysis on test issues, and drive yield improvement, test efficiency optimization, and cycle time reduction. Through close collaboration with global customers and supply chain partners, you help sustain Wiwynn’s competitiveness in the cloud infrastructure market.

Responsibilities

•	As a Manufacturing Test Engineer, you will develop and sustain test hardware and software to support the verification of product functionality following the assembly process of PCBAs.
•	Monitor production data to identify the MFG test related issues early while implementing continuous test process enhancements to ensure quality of product.
•	Perform root cause analysis of software and hardware failures occurring within the manufacturing test processes.
•	Develop, validate, and deploy scalable optimization plans for PCBA sites. Streamline manufacturing tests to shorten cycle time, cut hardware costs, and improve test coverage and system reliability.
•	Collaborate with manufacturing sites and customers to facilitate the transition from NPI to mass production.
•	Develops and maintains documentations on process and procedures within MTE team and with its internal partners.
•	Provide on-site support for manufacturing builds through domestic/international travel and flexible off-hours scheduling..

Minimum Qualifications

•	Bachelors or master’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Quality Engineering or related fields.
•	Understanding of the complete manufacturing process at the PCBA level.
•	Experience troubleshooting with engineering team on build related issues with products.
•	Experience of Linux/Windows OS/Virtualization operating
•	Working knowledge of computer subsystems, component interfaces, add-on boards, function test equipment, electronic test equipment.
•	Proficient in MS Excel/Word/Power Point applications or other related applications.
•	Excellent written and verbal English communication skills, with a proactive approach to client engagement and global team collaboration.
•	Quick learner and proven problem-solving ability.

Career Opportunities and Benefits

• Tier 1 Client Collaboration ── Work closely with industry-leading Tier 1 clients to gain firsthand experience with cutting-edge AI systems and advanced hardware including GPUs, ASICs, FPGAs...etc.
• Global Exposure & Travel ── Collaborate with diverse global teams and enjoy opportunities for domestic and international travel to experience local cultures firsthand.
• Flexible Hybrid Work ── Following successful completion of the probation period, work-from-home arrangements and flexible working hours may be offered subject to performance and role requirements.
• Choice of Workstation ── Select between high-performance Mac or Windows laptops as your primary tool to suit your development preferences.
公司名稱: 緯穎科技服務股份有限公司
產業描述: 電腦及其週邊設備製造業

▋ 關於德州儀器
德州儀器(TI)是位居類比晶片世界領導地位的半導體設計與製造公司，持續提供創新及頂尖的半導體技術與產品，協助客戶開發最先進的電子產品。除此之外，TI也針對在校學生及初入社會新鮮人設計完整的培訓制度與挑戰性的工作內容，並提供具競爭力的薪資與福利、完善的升遷管道、輪調培訓計畫以及活潑與國際化的工作環境。 

In your first year with TI, you will participate in the Career Accelerator Program (CAP), which provides professional and technical training and resources to accelerate your ramp into TI and set you up for long-term career success. Within this program, we also offer function-specific technical training and on-the-job learning opportunities that will encourage you to solve problems through a variety of hands-on, meaningful experiences from your very first day on the job.

As a Software Engineer, you will be part of a software design team where you'll learn the essentials of embedded systems design techniques, including foundational software development processes, the software development life-cycle and software development tools. You will gain knowledge of the following:

Foundational software development processes and life-cycle
Embedded software tools including industry best practices
Essentials for real-time embedded systems design and techniques to write and debug code
TI device architecture
Software IP licensing and Open Source
Software Development Kits (SDKs)
As part of your job, you will also get exposure to other roles such as: Software Applications, Software Systems and Test through formal learning, projects and on-the-job development experiences that will help you broaden your knowledge and accelerate your growth and success at TI.

Put your talent to work with us as a Software Engineer!

職缺名稱: 全端行動應用工程師｜遠端（台灣）｜總部香港
工作內容摘要:
關鍵職責（What You Will Deliver）
1. 使用 Flutter/Dart 開發、維運與優化 iOS/Android 跨平台 App（從需求到上架/發布）。
2. 撰寫乾淨、可維護的 Dart 原始碼，落實單元/整合測試與文件化。
3. 與 PM、設計、後端團隊協作，規劃並交付新功能與版本里程碑。
4. 串接後端服務與 API（REST/gRPC/GraphQL），確保資料流穩定、錯誤可觀測。
5. 排查並修復 App 問題，持續提升效能、穩定性與使用者體驗。
6. 參與 Code Review、維護工程規範與最佳實務，推動持續改進。
7. 追蹤 Flutter/行動端新技術並實際導入，優化流程與體驗。
8. 撰寫/維護技術規格、API 介面與系統設計文件。
9. 規劃與整合 AI 能力（如 LLM、向量檢索、推理服務）於行動端功能場景。

技術要求
1. Flutter/Dart 熟練，理解 Widget 生命週期、版面/導航、效能優化與狀態管理（至少一種：Riverpod、BLoC、Provider、GetX）。
2. 具 iOS/Android 原生整合經驗（Platform Channels、原生套件、上架流程）。
3. 精通 Go 語言後端開發：並發模型、模組化設計、測試、效能與可靠度工程。
4. 具前後端與資料庫實作能力：PostgreSQL/MySQL、Redis，熟悉索引、交易、效能調校與備援。
5. 熟悉 API 設計（REST/gRPC/GraphQL 其一以上）、認證授權與錯誤處理。
6. 熟悉 Git 與團隊協作流程（GitHub/GitLab Flow）、CI/CD 與基本可觀測性（logs/metrics/tracing）。
7. 具 AI 開發經驗（其一或數項）：LLM API 整合、向量資料庫、提示工程、模型推理或邊端推論。

經驗要求（Who You Are）
1. 2 年以上軟體開發經驗。
2. 使用 Flutter 完成過至少 1 個完整商業專案（含正式上線或企業內部上線）。
3. 具備 iOS、Android、前後端與資料庫的實務經驗。
4. 具備良好問題分析與除錯能力、文件撰寫與團隊協作溝通能力。
5. 有敏捷/Scrum 團隊合作經驗；英語讀寫溝通佳者優先。

加分項
1. 深入掌握狀態管理與 DI（如 BLoC/Riverpod/GetIt）、Flutter 測試框架（flutter_test）。
2. 熟悉行動端佈署/版號管理與 CI/CD（如 Codemagic、Fastlane）。
3. 具即時通訊/WebSocket、推播、離線同步等複雜場景實作經驗。
4. 熟悉雲端/容器（Docker/K8s、AWS/GCP 其一以上）、監控（Prometheus/Grafana）。
5. 具資安與隱私合規概念（OWASP、金鑰管理）；有 App Store/Google Play 上架實績或公開作品/GitHub。

此職位涉及創建安全且功能強大的代碼，提供優質的編碼解決方案，並為創新的軟件開發做出貢獻。如果您熱愛技術並注重細節，我們期待收到您的回應！

工作內容摘要:
在這個角色中，您將積極參與人工智慧/機器學習解決方案的演進，特別是在視覺、聲學和文本領域，同時運用您在嵌入式系統或雲端軟體系統方面的專業知識。您的工作將包括打造先進的神經網絡模型，並運用數據分析來迎接實際挑戰。

職責與職能包括：
－將人工智慧/機器學習技術應用於問題定義、模型開發和部署。
－進行研究，開發最先進的人工智慧/機器學習技術。
－將AI部署至嵌入式系統或雲端軟體系統相關工作經驗佳

※依學經歷、工作年資敘薪


我們是一個隸屬於創意中心的研發單位：

1. 激發創意的環境
我們的研發團隊是一個充滿創意和熱情的地方。這裡不僅僅是一個工作場所，更是一個激發靈感、探索未知領域的空間。我們鼓勵每個成員提出他們的想法，並且提供支持和資源來實現這些想法。

2. 多元化的專案
我們同時進行多種創新專案和產品開發項目。這意味著你將有機會參與各種各樣的項目，從概念到實踐，從實驗室到市場。這樣的多樣性將挑戰你的思維，擴展你的技能，並且使你不斷成長。

3. 學習和發展
